ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Passenger class */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the cabin was located */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title extracted from the name */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Total family size */,
  "is_child" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger is a child */,
  "is_alone" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger is traveling alone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger class (e.g., First, Second, Third) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the passenger class */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare paid by passengers in this class */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of passengers in this class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival statistic */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger class */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Calculated survival rate */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group */,
  "family_status" TEXT /* Family status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_stats_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Assigned cabin */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger holding the ticket */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifeboats" (
  "lifeboat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat */,
  "lifeboat_number" TEXT /* Lifeboat number */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the lifeboat */,
  "passengers_loaded" INTEGER /* Number of passengers loaded onto the lifeboat */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time when the lifeboat was launched */,
  "crew_count" INTEGER /* Number of crew members on the lifeboat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifeboat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin assignment */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "deck_level" TEXT /* Deck level of the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_assignments_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger involved in the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was filed */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
